description: Intent-only request: classify Zendesk ticket triage as workflow-anchored with bounded LLM classification feeding fixed routing.

conversation.text: When a Zendesk ticket arrives, classify it as billing/bug/access/product, set priority low/normal/high, and route to the matching Slack channel.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the classification and priority assignment are bounded LLM judgments feeding a finite set of routing branches, without iterative reasoning or tool-use loops.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
